subject: fix(header): switch theme to cyan, fix nav layout and readability
body:
Jade theme read as plain green — switched to cyan for teal/aqua brand color.
Brand text wrapped onto two lines on narrow screens — added nowrap + responsive
hide. Nav links were grey-on-dark (low contrast) — now use primary text color
with cyan hover. Renamed pico-jade.css → pico-theme.css to be theme-agnostic.

Tags: ui, theme, accessibility
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: header-styling
Semver: patch
